title: Ice Sword Mod
description: a mod that will add a less powerful sword to Minecraft that will freeze mobs and players. This will be useful in Manhunts when spawn in snow biomes.
body:
❄️ Ice Sword Mod

Harness the power of frozen magic with the Ice Sword, a legendary weapon forged from pure ice. This sword is more than just a blade — it controls the battlefield with chilling abilities and icy effects.

🗡 Features

❄ Freezing Strikes
Enemies hit by the Ice Sword are slowed and frozen, making escape nearly impossible.

🧊 Ice Prison Effect
Targets can become trapped in solid ice when struck.

🌨 Snow Trail
Walk across the land leaving a trail of snow behind you.

✨ Frost Particles
The sword releases icy particles while held, giving it a magical frozen aura.

💥 Ice Shockwave Ability
Right-click to unleash a burst of freezing energy that slows and freezes nearby mobs.

🛠 Crafting Recipe
Made using Packed Ice and a Stick, turning simple materials into a powerful frost weapon.
